name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_Item_PatientPaid
title: R5: Paid by the patient (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` 0..1 `Money`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` 0..1 `Money`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.item based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.patientPaid` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The amount paid by the patient, in total at the claim claim level or specifically for the item and detail level, to the provider for goods and services.
